message: Elevated knee valgus detected. Reduce load and focus on hip strengthening.
clinical_note: Persistent knee valgus under load increases ACL stress. If pain present, consult a sports medicine professional.

message: Significant left-right asymmetry detected. Address weaker side before increasing volume.
clinical_note: Asymmetry above 15% between limbs is associated with increased injury risk.

message: Critical fatigue detected. Stop high-intensity work immediately.
clinical_note: Training under extreme fatigue significantly elevates injury risk. End session now.

message: Excessive forward trunk lean detected. Risk of lower back overload.
clinical_note: Forward trunk lean beyond 20 degrees increases lumbar spine compressive forces.
